name: joplin-curl
description: Persist Joplin clipper settings once and let Codex inspect or update Joplin notes through curl-backed helper commands.

interface.shortDescription: Reuse saved Joplin clipper settings and operate on local notes via curl-backed helpers
interface.longDescription: Use Joplin Curl when Codex should read, search, create, or update notes in a local Joplin client. The plugin stores the clipper base URL, port, and token once in a local config file, then reuses that config through a helper CLI that executes curl requests against the Joplin Data API.
defaultPrompt: Set up my Joplin clipper connection and reuse it for future note tasks.
Find a Joplin note by title and update its body.
Create a new Joplin note in a selected notebook.
